author: manic
description: Wrap selected text in custom tags with shortcuts. E.g.: underline, sub, ruby (furigana).

manifest.author: Manic Chuang
manifest.description: Wrap selected text in custom tags with shortcuts. E.g.: underline, sub, ruby(フリガナ)
manifest.name: Wrap with shortcuts

name: Wrap with shortcuts

releases.author: manic
releases.description:
- Support mono tag. EX: `# {{selectedText}}`
- Support multiline tag like code blocks.
Example

```
    ```ruby
    {{selected}}
    ```
```

releases.author: manic
releases.description:
# Features

- Allow whitespaces from both ends when adding / editing wrappers 
- Allow to edit wrapper name
- Now the created wrappers would automatically sort in alphabetic order, just like obsidian does.

releases.author: manic
releases.description:
- Allow to edit tag (No need to restart Obsidian)
- Remove the shortcut key field
